sidebar.noPoints: Click or tap the canvas to place points

edit.title: Edit Coordinate
edit.constraintNote: Editing coordinates will automatically update linked points

page1.title: Click or tap the canvas to place points
page1.body: Click or tap the canvas to add points. Points connect in sequence to form the wire EDM machining route.

page2.title: Edit coordinates directly
page2.body: Enter X and Y values directly in the sidebar list. Long-press (press and hold) a point to open a dialog for editing coordinates or removing the point.

page3.title: Ortho mode and fixed segments
page3.body: Turn on Ortho mode to automatically create right-angle routes. Right-angle segments are kept as fixed and can be released from the long-press menu.

page4.title: Snap, grid, and history
page4.body: Enable Snap to attract points to existing ones. Show the grid for coordinate reference. Routes are auto-saved and can be reloaded from the History panel.

page5.title: Simulation and keyboard shortcuts
page5.body:
Click Simulate to preview the machining route.
Ctrl + Z to undo, Ctrl + Y to redo.

help.title: How to use
help.step1_desc: Click or tap the canvas to place a point. Points connect to form a route.
help.step2_desc: With Ortho mode on, lines snap to horizontal or vertical. Blue = horizontal, green = vertical.
help.step3_desc: Tap a point to select it; drag to move it. Long-press to open a coordinate editor.
help.step4_desc: With 2 or more points, start the simulation to preview the wire route in real time.
help.step5_desc: Tap Undo to reverse the last action. You can undo as many times as needed. Redo restores what you undid.
help.step6_desc: Tap New to save the current route and start fresh. Any past route can be recalled from the history list on the right.
help.step7_desc: Add mode places points on tap. Edit mode lets you pan the canvas by dragging. Switch from the toolbar.
